frame_eqs_str: a['dec_med']=pow(0.9, div(30,a['fps'])); a['dec_slow']=pow(0.99, div(30,a['fps'])); a['beat']=Math.max(Math.max(a['bass'], a['mid']), a['treb']); a['avg']=((a['avg']*a['dec_slow'])+(a['beat']*(1-a['dec_slow']))); a['is_beat']=(above(a['beat'], ((0.2+a['avg'])+a['peak']))*above(a['time'], (a['t0']+0.2))); a['t0']=((a['is_beat']*a['time'])+((1-a['is_beat'])*a['t0'])); a['peak']=((a['is_beat']*a['beat'])+(((1-a['is_beat'])*a['peak'])*a['dec_med'])); a['index']=mod((a['index']+a['is_beat']),12); a['index2']=mod((a['index2']+(a['is_beat']*bnot(a['index']))),2); a['q26']=(((a['bass_att']+a['mid_att'])+a['treb'])+1); a['q26']=3; a['q27']=(a['index']+1); a['q24']=a['is_beat']; a['q28']=(a['index2']-0.5); a['rot']=(0.0*a['q27']); a['dy']=(0.01*Math.sin(div(a['time'],7))); a['dx']=(0.01*Math.sin(div(a['time'],4))); a['zoom']=1.19;
